name: 5S Training
tagline: Pastel minimal 5S training deck with rounded photo cards, black offset shadows, soft color pills, organic circles, and clean workshop layouts.

palette.description: near-white canvas with black rounded type, pastel blue, mint, lavender, peach, and pale pink modules plus thick black offset shadows

typography.style: rounded bold training headings with monospaced workshop body copy

best_for: 5S, process improvement, safety training, team enablement, and practical workshop decks that should feel clear without becoming industrially harsh.
avoid_for: Luxury decks, dark technology pitches, or formal legal and finance presentations.

source_inspiration.name: SlidesCarnival 5S Training Slides
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview sequence. It follows the pastel minimal color system, rounded photo frames, pill buttons, soft organic circles, and black offset shadows without reusing source photos.
